title.zh: 关于高级 AI 风险的公开警告
title.en: Public Warnings About Advanced AI Risk

summary.zh: 科幻预言、技术狂热与 AI 寒冬
summary.en: Sci-Fi Prophecy, Hype and AI Winters

description.zh: 2014 年，埃隆·马斯克和斯蒂芬·霍金等人的公开警告，把高级 AI 风险从专业讨论推入主流媒体。这个节点应被理解为话语转向，而不是某个单一技术预测的证明。
description.en: In 2014, public warnings from figures such as Elon Musk and Stephen Hawking moved advanced-AI risk from specialist discussion into mainstream media. This node should be framed as a discourse shift, not as proof of a single technical forecast.

role.zh: 2014 年 AI 风险公共讨论者

role.en: Scientist warning about advanced AI control
role.zh: 警示高级 AI 控制问题的科学家

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
